title: Automation to Notify Users Supervisor Listed under the Users Profile
excerpt: We are requesting a New Automation to Notify an Item Users Supervisor if an Item is Overdue. We would like the Supervisor to be pulled from the Item Users Profiles.  We do not want to add an additional column labeled “Su…

posts.author: mhansen (Michelle Hansen)
posts.cookedHtml: We are requesting a New Automation to Notify an Item Users Supervisor if an Item is Overdue. We would like the Supervisor to be pulled from the Item Users Profiles. We do not want to add an additional column labeled “Supervisor” on each Board we create.
